title: What do we build now? — Theo Browne, @t3dotgg
reasoning: Excellent strategic roadmap for a junior fullstack engineer looking to build high-value products in the current AI transition era.
summary: As a junior fullstack developer, navigating the shift toward AI can feel overwhelming. Tech industry authority Theo Browne breaks down exactly what developers should be building right now to stay indispensable. This is your playbook for identifying profitable, high-impact project ideas early in your career.
